    Module mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.pseudometric_normed_Zmodule

    From HB Require Import structures.
    From mathcomp Require Import all_ssreflect_compat finmap ssralg ssrnum ssrint.
    From mathcomp Require Import interval interval_inference archimedean.
    From mathcomp Require Import boolp classical_sets functions cardinality.
    From mathcomp Require Import set_interval ereal reals topology.
    From mathcomp Require Import prodnormedzmodule num_normedtype.

    # Normed topological abelian groups This directory (`normed_theory`) file extends the topological hierarchy with norm-related notions. Note that balls in `topology_theory` are not necessarily open, here they are. ## Helper functions To be used in `normed_module.v`. ``` shift x y == y + x center c := shift (- c) This is a notation. ``` ## Left and right filters ``` x^'-, x^'+ == filters on real numbers for predicates s.t. nbhs holds on the left/right of x ``` ## Normed topological abelian groups ``` pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R == interface type for a normed topological abelian group equipped with a norm The HB class is PseudoMetricNormedZmod. NormedZmoduleMetric == factory for pseudoMetricNormedZmodType based on metric structures ``` ## Closed balls ``` closed_ball_ norm x e := [set y | norm (x - y) <= e] closed_ball == closure of a ball ``` ## Domination ``` dominated_by h k f F == `|f| <= k * `|h|, near F strictly_dominated_by h k f F == `|f| < k * `|h|, near F bounded_near f F == f is bounded near F [bounded f x | x in A] == f is bounded on A, ie F := globally A [locally [bounded f x | x in A] == f is locally bounded on A bounded_set == set of bounded sets := [set A | [bounded x | x in A]] bounded_fun == set of functions bounded on their whole domain := [set f | [bounded f x | x in setT]] fun1 : T -> K^o := fun=> 1 where K : numFiedlType ```

    Reserved Notation "[ 'bounded' E | x 'in' A ]"
      (at level 0, x name, format "[ 'bounded' E | x 'in' A ]").

    Unset SsrOldRewriteGoalsOrder.
    Set Implicit Arguments.
    Unset Strict Implicit.
    Unset Printing Implicit Defensive.

    Import Order.TTheory GRing.Theory Num.Theory.
    Import numFieldTopology.Exports.

    Local Open Scope classical_set_scope.
    Local Open Scope ring_scope.

    Section Shift.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : zmodType} {
    T
    Source code
     : Type}.

    Definition
    shift
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : R) := y + x.
    Notation
    center
    Source code
     c := (shift (- c)).
    Arguments shift x / y.

    Lemma
    comp_shiftK
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> T) : (f \o shift x) \o center x = f.
    Proof.
    by rewrite funeqE => y /=; rewrite addrNK. Qed.

    Lemma
    comp_centerK
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> T) : (f \o center x) \o shift x = f.
    Proof.
    by rewrite funeqE => y /=; rewrite addrK. Qed.

    Lemma
    shift0
    Source code
     : shift 0 = id.
    Proof.
    by rewrite funeqE => x /=; rewrite addr0. Qed.

    Lemma
    center0
    Source code
     : center 0 = id.
    Proof.
    by rewrite oppr0 shift0. Qed.

    End Shift.
    Arguments shift {R} x / y.
    Notation
    center
    Source code
     c := (shift (- c)).

    Lemma
    itv_center_shift
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     (
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : R) : (a < b) ->
      let
    c
    Source code
     := (a + b) / 2 in let
    r
    Source code
     := (b - a) / 2 in
      Interval (BSide x a) (BSide y b) =
      Interval (BSide x (center r c )) (BSide y (shift r c )).
    Proof.
    move=> ab c r; rewrite /shift /c /r -mulrBl addrKA opprK -mulrDl.
    rewrite [in X in _ = Interval _ X]addrC subrKA -!mulr2n.
    by rewrite -(mulr_natr a) -(mulr_natr b) !mulfK.
    Qed.

    Section at_left_right_topologicalType.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : topologicalType) (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> V) (
    x
    Source code
     : R).

    Lemma
    cvg_at_right_filter
    Source code
     (
    l
    Source code
     : V) :
      f z @[
    z
    Source code
     --> x] --> l -> f z @[
    z
    Source code
     --> x^'+] --> l.
    Proof.
    exact: (@cvg_within_filter _ _ _ (nbhs x)). Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_left_filter
    Source code
     (
    l
    Source code
     : V) :
      f z @[
    z
    Source code
     --> x] --> l -> f z @[
    z
    Source code
     --> x^'-] --> l.
    Proof.
    exact: (@cvg_within_filter _ _ _ (nbhs x)). Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_right_within
    Source code
     : f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> x^'+] --> f x ->
      f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> within (fun
    u
    Source code
     => x <= u) (nbhs x)] --> f x.
    Proof.
    move=> fxr U Ux; rewrite ?near_simpl ?near_withinE; near=> z; rewrite le_eqVlt.
    by move/predU1P => [<-|]; [exact: nbhs_singleton | near: z; exact: fxr].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_left_within
    Source code
     : f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> x^'-] --> f x ->
      f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> within (fun
    u
    Source code
     => u <= x) (nbhs x)] --> f x.
    Proof.
    move=> fxr U Ux; rewrite ?near_simpl ?near_withinE; near=> z; rewrite le_eqVlt.
    by move/predU1P => [->|]; [exact: nbhs_singleton | near: z; exact: fxr].
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End at_left_right_topologicalType.

    Let
    pseudo_metric_ball_norm
    Source code
     : ball = ball_ (fun
    x
    Source code
     : T => `| x |).
    Proof.
    apply/funext => /= t; apply/funext => d; rewrite ballEmdist.
    by apply/seteqP; split => [y|y]/=; rewrite mdist_norm distrC.
    Qed.

    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _

    Source code

      NormedZmod_PseudoMetric_eq.Build R T pseudo_metric_ball_norm.

    Source code
    .
    end

    Section pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numDomainType.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}.

    Balls defined by the norm:
    Local Notation
    ball_norm
    Source code
     := (ball_ (@Num.norm K V)).

    Lemma
    ball_normE
    Source code
     : ball_norm = ball.
    Proof.
    by rewrite pseudo_metric_ball_norm. Qed.

    Lemma
    ball_open
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    r
    Source code
     : K) : open (ball x r).
    Proof.
    rewrite openE/= -ball_normE/= /interior => y /= bxy; rewrite -nbhs_ballE.
    exists (r - `|x - y|) => /=; first by rewrite subr_gt0.
    move=> z; rewrite -ball_normE/= ltrBrDr.
    by apply: le_lt_trans; rewrite [in leRHS]addrC ler_distD.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    ball_open_nbhs
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    r
    Source code
     : K) : 0 < r -> open_nbhs x (ball x r).
    Proof.
    by move=> e0; split; [exact: ball_open|exact: ballxx]. Qed.

    Neighborhoods defined by the norm:
    Local Notation
    nbhs_norm
    Source code
     := (nbhs_ball_ ball_norm).

    Lemma
    nbhs_nbhs_norm
    Source code
     : nbhs_norm = nbhs.
    Proof.
    by rewrite ball_normE funeqE => x; rewrite -filter_from_ballE. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_normP
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : V -> Prop) : (\near
    x
    Source code
    , P x) <-> nbhs_norm x P.
    Proof.
    by rewrite nbhs_nbhs_norm. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_le_nbhs_norm
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) : @nbhs V _ x `=>` nbhs_norm x.
    Proof.
    by move=> P [e e0 subP]; apply/nbhs_normP; exists e. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_norm_le_nbhs
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : nbhs_norm x `=>` nbhs x.
    Proof.
    by move=> P /nbhs_normP [e e0 Pxe]; exists e. Qed.

    Lemma
    filter_from_norm_nbhs
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     :
      @filter_from K _ [set
    x
    Source code
     : K | 0 < x] (ball_norm x) = nbhs x.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -nbhs_nbhs_norm ball_normE. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_normE
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    P
    Source code
     : V -> Prop) :
      nbhs_norm x P = \near
    x
    Source code
    , P x.
    Proof.
    by rewrite nbhs_nbhs_norm near_simpl. Qed.

    Lemma
    filter_from_normE
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    P
    Source code
     : V -> Prop) :
      @filter_from K _ [set
    x
    Source code
     : K | 0 < x] (ball_norm x) P = \near
    x
    Source code
    , P x.
    Proof.
    by rewrite filter_from_norm_nbhs. Qed.

    Lemma
    near_nbhs_norm
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    P
    Source code
     : V -> Prop) :
      (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near nbhs_norm x, P x) = \near
    x
    Source code
    , P x.
    Proof.
    exact: nbhs_normE. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_norm_ball_norm
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    e
    Source code
     : {posnum K}) :
      nbhs_norm x (ball_norm x e%:num).
    Proof.
    by rewrite ball_normE; exists e%:num => /=. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_ball_norm
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    eps
    Source code
     : {posnum K}) : nbhs x (ball_norm x eps%:num).
    Proof.
    rewrite -nbhs_nbhs_norm; apply: nbhs_norm_ball_norm. Qed.

    Lemma
    ball_norm_dec
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     (
    e
    Source code
     : K) : {ball_norm x e y} + {~ ball_norm x e y}.
    Proof.
    exact: pselect. Qed.

    Lemma
    ball_norm_sym
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     (
    e
    Source code
     : K) : ball_norm x e y -> ball_norm y e x.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /ball_norm/= -opprB normrN. Qed.

    Lemma
    ball_norm_le
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    e1
    Source code
    e2
    Source code
     : K) :
      e1 <= e2 -> ball_norm x e1 `<=` ball_norm x e2.
    Proof.
    by move=> e1e2 y /lt_le_trans; apply. Qed.

    Let
    nbhs_simpl
    Source code
     := (nbhs_simpl,@nbhs_nbhs_norm,@filter_from_norm_nbhs).

    Lemma
    fcvgrPdist_lt
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system V} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      F --> y <-> forall
    eps
    Source code
    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    y'
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - y'| < eps.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -filter_fromP /= !nbhs_simpl. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgrPdist_lt
    Source code

    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f

    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y <-> forall
    eps
    Source code
    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - f t| < eps.
    Proof.
    exact: fcvgrPdist_lt. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgrPdistC_lt
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF

    f

    eps

    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t - y| < eps.
    Proof.
    by rewrite cvgrPdist_lt; under eq_forall do under eq_near do rewrite distrC.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_dist_lt
    Source code

    T
    Source code

    F

      f @ F --> y -> forall
    eps
    Source code

    t

    Lemma
    cvgr_dist_le
    Source code

    T
    Source code
    } {

    Source code

    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_norm0P
    Source code
     {
    P
    Source code
     : V -> Prop} :
      (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near 0, P x) <->
      filter_from [set
    e
    Source code
     | 0 < e] (fun
    e
    Source code
     => [set
    y
    Source code
     | `|y| < e]) P.
    Proof.
    rewrite nbhs_normP; split=> -[/= e e0 Pe];
    by exists e => // y /=; have /= := Pe y; rewrite distrC subr0.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Lemma
    cvgr0_norm_lt

    T

    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| < eps.
    Proof.
    by move=> /cvgr0Pnorm_lt. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr0_norm_le
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) :
      f @ F --> 0 -> forall
    eps
    Source code
    , eps > 0 -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| <= eps.
    Proof.
    by move=> ? ? ?; near do rewrite ltW//; apply: cvgr0_norm_lt.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs0_lt
    Source code
    e
    Source code
     : 0 < e -> \forall
    x
    Source code
     \near (0 : V), `|x| < e.
    Proof.
    exact: cvgr0_norm_lt. Qed.

    Lemma
    dnbhs0_lt
    Source code
    e
    Source code
     : 0 < e -> \forall
    x
    Source code
     \near (0 : V)^', `|x| < e.
    Proof.
    by move=> e_gt0; apply: cvg_within; apply: nbhs0_lt. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs0_le
    Source code
    e
    Source code
     : 0 < e -> \forall
    x
    Source code
     \near (0 : V), `|x| <= e.
    Proof.
    exact: cvgr0_norm_le. Qed.

    Lemma
    dnbhs0_le
    Source code
    e
    Source code
     : 0 < e -> \forall
    x
    Source code
     \near (0 : V)^', `|x| <= e.
    Proof.
    by move=> e_gt0; apply: cvg_within; apply: nbhs0_le. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_norm_ball
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    eps
    Source code
     : {posnum K}) : nbhs_norm x (ball x eps%:num).
    Proof.
    by rewrite nbhs_nbhs_norm; exact: nbhsx_ballx. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsDl
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set V) (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      (\forall
    z
    Source code
     \near (x + y), P z) <-> (\near
    x
    Source code
    , P (x + y)).
    Proof.
    split=> /nbhs_normP[_/posnumP[e]/= Px]; apply/nbhs_normP; exists e%:num => //=.
      by move=> z /= xze; apply: Px; rewrite /= [z + y]addrC addrKA.
    by move=> z /= xyz; rewrite -[z](addrNK y); apply: Px; rewrite /= opprB addrA.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhsDr
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set V)
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     :
      (\forall
    z
    Source code
     \near (x + y), P z) <-> (\near
    y
    Source code
    , P (x + y)).
    Proof.
    by rewrite addrC nbhsDl -propeqE; apply: eq_near => ?; rewrite addrC. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs0P
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set V)
    x
    Source code
     : (\near
    x
    Source code
    , P x) <-> (\forall
    e
    Source code
     \near 0, P (x + e)).
    Proof.
    by rewrite -nbhsDr addr0. Qed.

    Lemma
    near_shift
    Source code
     (
    y
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    P
    Source code
     : set V) :
      (\near
    x
    Source code
    , P x) = (\forall
    z
    Source code
     \near y, (P \o shift (x - y)) z).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE nbhs0P [X in _ <-> X]nbhs0P/= -propeqE.
    by apply: eq_near => e; rewrite [_ + _ + _]addrC subrKA.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_comp_shift
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) (
    f
    Source code
     : V -> T) :
      (f \o shift x) @ y = f @ (y + x).
    Proof.
    rewrite funeqE => A; rewrite /= !near_simpl (near_shift (y + x)).
    by rewrite (_ : _ \o _ = A \o f) // funeqE=> z; rewrite /= opprD addNKr addrNK.
    Qed.

    End pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numDomainType.
    #[global] Hint Resolve normr_ge0 : core.
    Arguments cvgr_dist_lt {_ _ _ F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_distC_lt {_ _ _ F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_dist_le {_ _ _ F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_distC_le {_ _ _ F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr0_norm_lt {_ _ _ F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr0_norm_le {_ _ _ F FF}.

    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|_ - ?x| < _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr_dist_lt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|?x - _| < _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr_distC_lt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|?x| < _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr0_norm_lt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|_ - ?x| <= _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr_dist_le] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|?x - _| <= _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr_distC_le] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (`|?x| <= _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: cvgr0_norm_le] end : core.

    Section pseudoMetricNormedZmod_realDomainType.

    Lemma
    le0_ball0
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R) (
    a
    Source code
     : V) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) :
      r <= 0 -> ball a r = set0.
    Proof.
    move=> r0; rewrite -subset0 => y.
    rewrite -ball_normE /ball_/= ltNge => /negP; apply.
    by rewrite (le_trans r0).
    Qed.

    End pseudoMetricNormedZmod_realDomainType.

    Section pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numFieldType.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R).

    Lemma
    norm_hausdorff
    Source code
     : hausdorff_space V.
    Proof.
    rewrite ball_hausdorff => a b ab.
    have ab2 : 0 < `|a - b| / 2 by apply divr_gt0 => //; rewrite normr_gt0 subr_eq0.
    set r := PosNum ab2; exists (r, r) => /=.
    apply/eqP/nonemptyPn => -[c] []; rewrite -ball_normE /ball_ => acr bcr.
    have r22 : r%:num * 2 = r%:num + r%:num.
      by rewrite (_ : 2 = 1 + 1) // mulrDr mulr1.
    move: (ltrD acr bcr); rewrite -r22 (distrC b c).
    by move/(le_lt_trans (ler_distD c a b)); rewrite -mulrA mulVf// mulr1 ltxx.
    Qed.
    Local Hint Extern 0 (hausdorff_space _) => solve[apply: norm_hausdorff] : core.


    Lemma
    norm_closeE
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) : close x y = (x = y)
    Proof.
    exact: closeE. Qed.
    Lemma
    norm_close_eq
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) : close x y -> x = y
    Proof.
    exact: close_eq. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvg_unique
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} :
      is_subset1 [set
    x
    Source code
     : V | F --> x].
    Proof.
    exact: cvg_unique. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvg_eq
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) : x --> y -> x = y
    Proof.
    exact: (@cvg_eq V). Qed.
    Lemma
    norm_lim_id
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) : lim (nbhs x) = x
    Proof.
    exact: lim_id. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvg_lim
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} (
    l
    Source code
     : V) : F --> l -> lim F = l.
    Proof.
    exact: (@cvg_lim V). Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_lim_near_cst
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} (
    l
    Source code
     : V) (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V) :
       (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near F, f x = l) -> lim (f @ F) = l.
    Proof.
    exact: lim_near_cst. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_lim_cst
    Source code
    U
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} (
    k
    Source code
     : V) :
       lim ((fun _ : U => k) @ F) = k.
    Proof.
    exact: lim_cst. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvgi_unique
    Source code
     {
    U
    Source code
     : Type} {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> set V) :
      {near F, is_fun f} -> is_subset1 [set
    x
    Source code
     : V | f `@ F --> x].
    Proof.
    exact: cvgi_unique. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvgi_lim
    Source code
     {
    U
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
    } {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V -> Prop) (
    l
    Source code
     : V) :
      F (fun
    x
    Source code
     : U => is_subset1 (f x)) ->
      f `@ F --> l -> lim (f `@ F) = l.
    Proof.
    exact: cvgi_lim. Qed.

    Lemma
    distm_lt_split
    Source code
     (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) :
      `|x - z| < e / 2 -> `|z - y| < e / 2 -> `|x - y| < e.
    Proof.
    by have := @ball_split _ _ z x y e; rewrite -ball_normE. Qed.

    Lemma
    distm_lt_splitr
    Source code
     (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) :
      `|z - x| < e / 2 -> `|z - y| < e / 2 -> `|x - y| < e.
    Proof.
    by have := @ball_splitr _ _ z x y e; rewrite -ball_normE. Qed.

    Lemma
    distm_lt_splitl
    Source code
     (
    z
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) :
      `|x - z| < e / 2 -> `|y - z| < e / 2 -> `|x - y| < e.
    Proof.
    by have := @ball_splitl _ _ z x y e; rewrite -ball_normE. Qed.

    Lemma
    normm_leW
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) : e > 0 -> `|x| <= e / 2 -> `|x| < e.
    Proof.
    by move=> /posnumP[{}e] /le_lt_trans ->//; rewrite [ltRHS]splitr ltr_pwDl.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    normm_lt_split
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) :
      `|x| < e / 2 -> `|y| < e / 2 -> `|x + y| < e.
    Proof.
    by move=> xlt ylt; rewrite -[y]opprK (@distm_lt_split 0) ?subr0 ?opprK ?add0r.
    Qed.

    End pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numFieldType.
    #[global]
    Hint Extern 0 (hausdorff_space _) => solve[apply: norm_hausdorff] : core.

    Section prod_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    U
    Source code
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}.

    Lemma
    ball_prod_normE
    Source code
     : ball = ball_ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => `| x : U * V |).
    Proof.
    rewrite funeq2E => - [xu xv] e; rewrite predeqE => - [yu yv].
    rewrite /ball /= /prod_ball -!ball_normE /ball_ /=.
    by rewrite comparable_gt_max// ?real_comparable//; split=> /andP.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    prod_norm_ball
    Source code
     : @ball _ (U * V)%type = ball_ (fun
    x
    Source code
     => `|x|).
    Proof.
    by rewrite /= - ball_prod_normE. Qed.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    NormedZmod_PseudoMetric_eq
    Source code
    .Build K (U * V)%type
      prod_norm_ball.

    End prod_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.

    Section standard_topology_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.
    Variable
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    Num
    Source code
    .NormedZmodule.on R^o.

    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    :=
    Source code
    NormedZmod_PseudoMetric_eq
    Source code
    .Build R R^o erefl.

    End standard_topology_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.

    Lemma
    ball_itv
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    x
    Source code
    r
    Source code
     : R) :
      ball x r = `]x - r, x + r[%classic.
    Proof.
    rewrite -(@ball_normE _ R^o) /ball_ set_itvE.
    by apply/seteqP; split => t/=; rewrite ltr_distlC.
    Qed.

    Normed vector spaces have some continuous functions that are in fact continuous on pseudoMetricNormedZmodType
    Section continuity_pseudoMetricNormedZmodType.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}.

    Lemma
    oppr_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (@GRing.opp V).
    Proof.
    move=> x; apply/cvgrPdist_lt=> e e0; near do rewrite -opprD normrN.
    exact: cvgr_dist_lt.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    add_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    z
    Source code
     : V * V => z.1 + z.2).
    Proof.
    move=> [/= x y]; apply/cvgrPdist_lt=> _/posnumP[e]; near=> a b => /=.
    by rewrite opprD addrACA normm_lt_split.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    natmul_continuous
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : continuous (fun
    x
    Source code
     : V => x *+ n).
    Proof.
    case: n => [|n] x; first exact: cvg_cst.
    apply/cvgrPdist_lt=> _/posnumP[e]; near=> a.
    by rewrite -mulrnBl normrMn -mulr_natr -ltr_pdivlMr.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_continuous
    Source code
     : continuous (Num.norm : V -> K).
    Proof.
    move=> x; apply/(@cvgrPdist_lt K K^o) => e e0; apply/nbhs_normP.
    by exists e => //= y; exact/le_lt_trans/ler_dist_dist.
    Qed.

    End continuity_pseudoMetricNormedZmodType.
    #[deprecated(since="mathcomp-analysis 1.11.0", note="renamed to `oppr_continuous`")]
    Notation
    opp_continuous
    Source code
     := oppr_continuous (only parsing).

    Section hausdorff.

    #[deprecated(since="mathcomp-analysis 1.10.0", note="use `norm_hausdorff` instead")]
    Lemma
    pseudoMetricNormedZModType_hausdorff
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType)
        (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R) :
      hausdorff_space V.
    Proof.
    exact: norm_hausdorff. Qed.

    End hausdorff.

    Section at_left_right.
    Variable
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType.

    Lemma
    nbhs_right0P
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set R) :
      (\forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x^'+, P y) <-> \forall
    e
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, P (x + e).
    Proof.
    rewrite !near_withinE !near_simpl.
    rewrite (@nbhs0P R R^o)// -propeqE.
    by apply: (@eq_near _ (nbhs (0 : R))) => y; rewrite ltrDl.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_left0P
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set R) :
      (\forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x^'-, P y) <-> \forall
    e
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, P (x - e).
    Proof.
    rewrite !near_withinE !near_simpl (@nbhs0P R R^o); split=> Px.
      rewrite -oppr0 nearN; near=> e; rewrite ltrN2 opprK => e_lt0.
      by apply: (near Px) => //; rewrite gtrDl.
    by rewrite -oppr0 nearN; near=> e; rewrite gtrDl oppr_lt0; apply: (near Px).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_right_leftP
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : R) (
    P
    Source code
     : pred R) :
      (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near (- p)^'+, (P \o -%R) x) <-> (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near p^'-, P x).
    Proof.
    by rewrite nbhs_right0P nbhs_left0P; split;
      apply: filterS=> r/=; rewrite opprD opprK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_left_gt
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    z
    Source code
     : R) : z < x -> \forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x^'-, z < y.
    Proof.
    move=> xz; rewrite nbhs_left0P; near do rewrite -ltrN2 opprB ltrBlDl.
    by apply: nbhs_right_lt; rewrite subr_gt0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_left_ge
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
    z
    Source code
     : R) : z < x -> \forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x^'-, z <= y.
    Proof.
    by move=> xz; near do apply/ltW; apply: nbhs_left_gt.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    nbhs_left_ltBl
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R)
    e
    Source code
     : 0 < e -> \forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x^'-, x - y < e.
    Proof.
    move=> e0; near=> y; rewrite -ltrBrDl ltrNl opprB; near: y.
    by apply: nbhs_left_gt; rewrite ltrBlDr ltrDl.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    not_near_at_leftP
    Source code
     (
    p
    Source code
     : R) (
    P
    Source code
     : pred R) :
      ~ (\forall
    x
    Source code
     \near p^'-, P x) <->
      forall
    e
    Source code
     : {posnum R}, exists2
    x
    Source code
     : R, p - e%:num < x < p & ~ P x.
    Proof.
    rewrite -nbhs_right_leftP not_near_at_rightP; split => + e => /(_ e)[r pre Pr].
    - by exists (- r) => //; rewrite ltrNr andbC ltrNl opprB addrC.
    - by exists (- r) => /=; rewrite ?opprK// ltrN2 ltrNl opprD opprK andbC.
    Qed.

    Let
    fun_predC
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> T) (
    p
    Source code
     : pred T) : involutive f ->
      [set f x |
    x
    Source code
     in p] = [set x |
    x
    Source code
     in p \o f].
    Proof.
    by move=> fi; apply/seteqP; split => _/= [y hy <-];
      exists (f y) => //; rewrite fi.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    at_rightN
    Source code
     (
    a
    Source code
     : R) : (- a)^'+ = -%R @ a^'-.
    Proof.
    rewrite /at_right withinN [X in within X _](_ : _ = [set
    u
    Source code
     | u < a])//.
    rewrite (@fun_predC _ -%R)/=; first exact: opprK.
    by rewrite image_id; under eq_fun do rewrite ltrNl opprK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    at_leftN
    Source code
     (
    a
    Source code
     : R) : (- a)^'- = -%R @ a^'+.
    Proof.
    rewrite /at_left withinN [X in within X _](_ : _ = [set
    u
    Source code
     | a < u])//.
    rewrite (@fun_predC _ -%R)/=; first exact: opprK.
    by rewrite image_id; under eq_fun do rewrite ltrNl opprK.
    Qed.

    End at_left_right.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_leftNP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType} {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
        (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> T)
    a
    Source code
     (
    l
    Source code
     : T) :
      f @ a^'- --> l <-> f \o -%R @ (- a)^'+ --> l.
    Proof.
    by rewrite at_rightN -?fmap_comp; under [_ \o _]eq_fun => ? do rewrite /= opprK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_at_rightNP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType} {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
        (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> T)
    a
    Source code
     (
    l
    Source code
     : T) :
      f @ a^'+ --> l <-> f \o -%R @ (- a)^'- --> l.
    Proof.
    by rewrite at_leftN -?fmap_comp; under [_ \o _]eq_fun => ? do rewrite /= opprK.
    Qed.

    Section at_left_right_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R).

    Lemma
    nbhsr0P
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set V)
    x
    Source code
     :
      (\forall
    y
    Source code
     \near x, P y) <->
      (\forall
    e
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, forall
    y
    Source code
    , `|x - y| <= e -> P y).
    Proof.
    rewrite nbhs0P/= near_withinE/= !near_simpl.
    split.
      move => /nbhs_norm0P[/= _/posnumP[e] /(_ _) Px].
      apply/(@nbhs_norm0P R R^o).
      exists e%:num => //= r /= re yr y xyr; rewrite -[y](addrNK x) addrC.
      by apply: Px; rewrite /= distrC (le_lt_trans _ re)// gtr0_norm.
    move => /(@nbhs_norm0P R R^o)[/= _/posnumP[e] /(_ _) Px].
    apply/(@nbhs_norm0P R V).
    exists (e%:num / 2) => //= r /= re; apply: (Px (e%:num / 2)) => //=.
      by rewrite gtr0_norm// ltr_pdivrMr// ltr_pMr// ltr1n.
    by rewrite opprD addNKr normrN ltW.
    Qed.

    Let
    cvgrP
    Source code
     {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system V} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    y
    Source code
     : V) : [<->
      F --> y;
      forall
    eps
    Source code
    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - t| <= eps;
      \forall
    eps
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - t| <= eps;
      \forall
    eps
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - t| < eps].
    Proof.
    tfae; first by move=> *; apply: cvgr_dist_le.
    - by move=> Fy; near do apply: Fy; apply: nbhs_right_gt.
    - move=> Fy; near=> e; near (0:R)^'+ => d; near=> x.
      rewrite (@le_lt_trans _ _ d)//; first by near: x; near: d.
      by near: d; apply: nbhs_right_lt; near: e; apply: nbhs_right_gt.
    - move=> Fy; apply/cvgrPdist_lt => e e_gt0; near (0:R)^'+ => d.
      near=> x; rewrite (@lt_le_trans _ _ d)//; first by near: x; near: d.
      by near: d; apply: nbhs_right_le.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgrPdist_le
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y <-> forall
    eps
    Source code
    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|y - f t| <= eps.
    Proof.
    exact: (cvgrP _ 0 1)%N. Qed.

    cvgrPdist_ltp

    T
    Source code

     : set_system T} {

     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (

      f @ F --> y <-> \forall

     \near 0^'+, \forall

     \near F, `|y - f t| < eps.
    Proof.
    exact: (cvgrP _ 0 3)%N. Qed.

     : set_system T} {

      f @ F --> y <-> \forall

     \near 0^'+, \forall

     \near F, `|y - f t| <= eps.
    Proof.
    exact: (cvgrP _ 0 2)%N. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgrPdistC_le
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y <-> forall
    eps
    Source code
    , 0 < eps -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t - y| <= eps.
    Proof.
    rewrite cvgrPdist_le.
    by under [X in X <-> _]eq_forall do under eq_near do rewrite distrC.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgrPdistC_ltp
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF

     : Filter F} (
    f

      f @ F --> y <-> \forall

     \near 0^'+, \forall
    t

     \near F, `|f t - y| < eps.
    Proof.
    by rewrite cvgrPdist_ltp; under eq_near do under eq_near do rewrite distrC.
    Qed.

     \near 0^'+, \forall

     \near F, `|f t - y| <= eps.

    by rewrite cvgrPdist_lep; under eq_near do under eq_near do rewrite distrC.
    Qed.

     {

    } {

      f @ F --> 0 <-> forall

    , 0 < eps -> \forall

    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| <= eps.
    Proof.
    rewrite cvgrPdistC_le.
    by under [X in X <-> _]eq_forall do under eq_near do rewrite subr0.

     \near F, `|f t| < eps.

    Lemma
    cvgr0Pnorm_lep
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) :
      f @ F --> 0 <-> \forall

     \near 0^'+, \forall

     \near F, `|f t| <= eps.

    by rewrite cvgrPdistC_lep; under eq_near do under eq_near do rewrite subr0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_lt
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y -> forall
    u
    Source code
    , `|y| < u -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| < u.
    Proof.
    move=> Fy z zy; near (0:R)^'+ => k; near=> x; have : `|f x - y| < k.
      by near: x; apply: cvgr_distC_lt => //; near: k; apply: nbhs_right_gt.
    move=> /(le_lt_trans (ler_dist_dist _ _)) /real_ltr_normlW.
    rewrite realB// ltrBlDl => /(_ _)/lt_le_trans; apply => //.
    by rewrite -lerBrDl; near: k; apply: nbhs_right_le; rewrite subr_gt0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_le
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y -> forall
    u
    Source code
    , `|y| < u -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| <= u.
    Proof.
    by move=> fy u yu; near do apply/ltW; apply: cvgr_norm_lt yu.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_gt
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y -> forall
    u
    Source code
    , `|y| > u -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| > u.
    Proof.
    move=> Fy z zy; near (0:R)^'+ => k; near=> x; have: `|f x - y| < k.
      by near: x; apply: cvgr_distC_lt => //; near: k; apply: nbhs_right_gt.
    move=> /(le_lt_trans (ler_dist_dist _ _)); rewrite distrC => /real_ltr_normlW.
    rewrite realB// ltrBlDl -ltrBlDr => /(_ isT); apply: le_lt_trans.
    rewrite lerBrDl -lerBrDr; near: k; apply: nbhs_right_le.
    by rewrite subr_gt0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_ge
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y -> forall
    u
    Source code
    , `|y| > u -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, `|f t| >= u.
    Proof.
    by move=> fy u yu; near do apply/ltW; apply: cvgr_norm_gt yu.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_neq0
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T} {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F} (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V) :
      f @ F --> y -> y != 0 -> \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near F, f t != 0.
    Proof.
    move=> Fy z; near do rewrite -normr_gt0.
    by apply: (@cvgr_norm_gt _ _ _ _ y); rewrite // normr_gt0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End at_left_right_pseudoMetricNormedZmod.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_lt {R V T F FF f}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_le {R V T F FF f}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_gt {R V T F FF f}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_ge {R V T F FF f}.
    Arguments cvgr_neq0 {R V T F FF f}.

    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (_ < ?x)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_right_gt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x < _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_left_lt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x != _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_right_neq] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x != _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_left_neq] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (_ < ?x)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_left_gt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x < _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_right_lt] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (_ <= ?x)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_right_ge] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x <= _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_left_le] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (_ <= ?x)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_right_ge] end : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (is_true (?x <= _)) => match goal with
      H : x \is_near _ |- _ => solve[near: x; now apply: nbhs_left_le] end : core.

    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (ProperFilter _^'-) =>
      (apply: at_left_proper_filter) : typeclass_instances.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 (ProperFilter _^'+) =>
      (apply: at_right_proper_filter) : typeclass_instances.

    Lemma
    continuous_comp_cvg
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType} (
    U
    Source code
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R)
      (
    f
    Source code
     : U -> V) (
    g
    Source code
     : R -> U) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) (
    l
    Source code
     : V) : continuous f ->
      (f \o g) x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> r] --> l -> f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> g r] --> l.
    Proof.
    move=> cf fgl; apply/(@cvgrPdist_le _ V) => /= e e0.
    have e20 : 0 < e / 2 by rewrite divr_gt0.
    move/(@cvgrPdist_le _ V) : fgl => /(_ _ e20) fgl.
    have /(@cvgrPdist_le _ V) /(_ _ e20) fgf := cf (g r).
    rewrite !near_simpl/=; near=> t.
    rewrite -(@subrK _ (f (g r)) l) -(addrA (_ + _)) (le_trans (ler_normD _ _))//.
    rewrite (splitr e) lerD//; last by near: t.
    by case: fgl => d /= d0; apply; rewrite /ball_/= subrr normr0.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Section closure_left_right_open.
    Variable
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType.
    Implicit Types z : R.

    Lemma
    closure_gt
    Source code
    z
    Source code
     : closure ([set
    x
    Source code
     | z < x] : set R) = [set
    x
    Source code
     | z <= x].
    Proof.
    rewrite eqEsubset; split.
      by rewrite closureE; apply: smallest_sub => // ? /ltW.
    move=> v; rewrite /mkset le_eqVlt => /predU1P[<-{v}|]; last first.
      by move=> ?; exact: subset_closure.
    move=> B [e /= e0 zB]; near (0 : R)^'+ => d.
    exists (z + d); split; rewrite /= ?ltrDl//; apply: zB => /=.
    by rewrite opprD addNKr normrN gtr0_norm//.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    closure_lt
    Source code
    z
    Source code
     : closure ([set
    x
    Source code
     : R | x < z]) = [set
    x
    Source code
     | x <= z].
    Proof.
    rewrite eqEsubset; split.
      by rewrite closureE; apply: smallest_sub => // ? /ltW.
    move=> v; rewrite /mkset le_eqVlt => /predU1P[<-{z}|]; last first.
      by move=> ?; exact: subset_closure.
    move=> B [e /= e0 vB]; near (0 : R)^'+ => d.
    exists (v - d); split; rewrite /= ?gtrDl ?oppr_lt0//; apply: vB => /=.
    by rewrite opprB addrC addrNK gtr0_norm//; near: d.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End closure_left_right_open.

    Section open_itv_subset.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType}.
    Variables (
    A
    Source code
     : set R) (
    x
    Source code
     : R).

    Lemma
    open_itvoo_subset
    Source code
     :
      open A -> A x -> \forall
    r
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, `]x - r, x + r[ `<=` A.
    Proof.
    move=> /[apply] -[] _/posnumP[r] /subset_ball_prop_in_itv xrA.
    exists r%:num => //= k; rewrite /= distrC subr0 set_itvoo => /ltr_normlW kr k0.
    by apply/(subset_trans _ xrA)/subset_itvW; apply/ltW;
      [rewrite ler_ltB | rewrite ler_ltD].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    open_itvcc_subset
    Source code
     :
      open A -> A x -> \forall
    r
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, `[x - r, x + r] `<=` A.
    Proof.
    move=> /[apply] -[] _/posnumP[r].
    have -> : r%:num = 2 * (r%:num / 2) by rewrite mulrCA divff// mulr1.
    move/subset_ball_prop_in_itvcc => /= xrA; exists (r%:num / 2) => //= k.
    rewrite /= distrC subr0 set_itvcc => /ltr_normlW kr k0.
    move=> z /andP [xkz zxk]; apply: xrA => //; rewrite in_itv/=; apply/andP; split.
      by rewrite (le_trans _ xkz)// lerB// ltW.
    by rewrite (le_trans zxk)// lerD// ltW.
    Qed.

    End open_itv_subset.

    Lemma
    dense_set1C
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : dense (~` [set r]).
    Proof.
    move=> /= O O0 oO.
    suff [s Os /eqP sr] : exists2
    s
    Source code
    , O s & s != r by exists s; split.
    case: O0 => o Oo.
    have [->{r}|ro] := eqVneq r o; last by exists o => //; rewrite eq_sym.
    have [e' /= e'0 e'o] := open_itvoo_subset oO Oo.
    near (0:R)^'+ => e.
    exists (o + e/2)%R; last by rewrite gt_eqF// ltrDl// divr_gt0.
    apply: (e'o e) => //=.
      by rewrite sub0r normrN gtr0_norm.
    rewrite in_itv/= !ltrD2l; apply/andP; split.
      by rewrite (@lt_le_trans _ _ 0%R) ?divr_ge0// ltrNl oppr0.
    by rewrite gtr_pMr// invf_lt1// ltr1n.
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Section pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numFieldType.
    Variables (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R).
    Variables (
    I
    Source code
     : Type) (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system I) (
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F) (
    f
    Source code
     : I -> V) (
    y
    Source code
     : V).

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_lty
    Source code
     :
      f @ F --> y -> \forall
    M
    Source code
     \near +oo, \forall
    y'
    Source code
     \near F, `|f y'| < M.
    Proof.
    by move=> Fy; near do exact: (cvgr_norm_lt y).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_ley
    Source code
     :
      f @ F --> y -> \forall
    M
    Source code
     \near +oo, \forall
    y'
    Source code
     \near F, `|f y'| <= M.
    Proof.
    by move=> Fy; near do exact: (cvgr_norm_le y).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_gtNy
    Source code
     :
      f @ F --> y -> \forall
    M
    Source code
     \near -oo, \forall
    y'
    Source code
     \near F, `|f y'| > M.
    Proof.
    by move=> Fy; near do exact: (cvgr_norm_gt y).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgr_norm_geNy
    Source code
     :
      f @ F --> y -> \forall
    M
    Source code
     \near -oo, \forall
    y'
    Source code
     \near F, `|f y'| >= M.
    Proof.
    by move=> Fy; near do exact: (cvgr_norm_ge y).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    End pseudoMetricNormedZmod_numFieldType.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_lty {R V I F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_ley {R V I F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_gtNy {R V I F FF}.
    Arguments cvgr_norm_geNy {R V I F FF}.

    Section realFieldType.
    Context (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType).

    Lemma
    at_right_in_segment
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : R) (
    P
    Source code
     : set R) :
      (\forall
    e
    Source code
     \near 0^'+, {in `[x - e, x + e], forall
    x
    Source code
    , P x}) <-> (\near
    x
    Source code
    , P x).
    Proof.
    rewrite (@nbhsr0P _ R^o) -propeqE; apply: eq_near => y /=.
    by rewrite -propeqE; apply: eq_forall => z; rewrite ler_distlC.
    Qed.

    End realFieldType.

    Module Export
    NbhsNorm
    Source code
    .
    Definition
    nbhs_simpl
    Source code
     := (nbhs_simpl,@nbhs_nbhs_norm,@filter_from_norm_nbhs).
    End NbhsNorm.

    Section continuous_within_itvP.
    Context {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType}
      {
    U
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}.
    Implicit Type f : R -> U.

    Let
    near_at_left
    Source code
     (
    a
    Source code
     : itv_bound R)
    b
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    eps
    Source code
     : (a < BLeft b)%O -> 0 < eps ->
      {within [set` Interval a (BRight b)], continuous f} ->
      \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near b^'-, `|f b - f t| < eps.
    Proof.
    move=> ab eps_gt0 cf.
    move/continuous_withinNx/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0) : (cf b).
    rewrite /dnbhs/= near_withinE !near_simpl /prop_near1 /nbhs/=.
    rewrite -nbhs_subspace_in//.
      rewrite /= in_itv/= lexx andbT.
      by move: a ab {cf} => [[a|a]/=|[|]//]; rewrite bnd_simp// => /ltW.
    rewrite /within/= near_simpl; apply: filter_app.
    move: a ab {cf} => [a0 a/= /[!bnd_simp] ab|[_|//]].
    - exists (b - a); rewrite /= ?subr_gt0// => c cba + ac.
      apply=> //; rewrite ?lt_eqF// !in_itv/= (ltW ac)/= andbT; move: cba => /=.
      rewrite gtr0_norm ?subr_gt0// ltrD2l ltrNr opprK => {}ac.
      by case: a0 => //=; exact/ltW.
    - by exists 1%R => //= c cb1 + bc; apply; rewrite ?lt_eqF ?in_itv/= ?ltW.
    Qed.

    Let
    near_at_right
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     (
    b
    Source code
     : itv_bound R)
    f
    Source code
    eps
    Source code
     : (BRight a < b)%O -> 0 < eps ->
      {within [set` Interval (BLeft a) b], continuous f} ->
      \forall
    t
    Source code
     \near a^'+, `|f a - f t| < eps.
    Proof.
    move=> ab eps_gt0 cf.
    move/continuous_withinNx/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0) : (cf a).
    rewrite /dnbhs/= near_withinE !near_simpl// /prop_near1 /nbhs/=.
    rewrite -nbhs_subspace_in//.
      rewrite /= in_itv/= lexx//=.
      by move: b ab {cf} => [[b|b]/=|[|]//]; rewrite bnd_simp// => /ltW.
    rewrite /within/= near_simpl; apply: filter_app.
    move: b ab {cf} => [b0 b/= /[!bnd_simp] ab|[//|_]].
    - exists (b - a); rewrite /= ?subr_gt0// => c cba + ac.
      apply=> //; rewrite ?gt_eqF// !in_itv/= (ltW ac)/=; move: cba => /=.
      rewrite ltr0_norm ?subr_lt0// opprB ltrD2r.
      by case: b0 => //= /ltW.
    - by exists 2%R => //= c ca1 + ac; apply; rewrite ?gt_eqF ?in_itv/= ?ltW.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    continuous_within_itvP
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : a < b ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f} <->
      [/\ {in `]a, b[, continuous f}, f @ a^'+ --> f a & f @b^'- --> f b].
    Proof.
    move=> ab; split=> [abf|].
      split; [apply/in_continuous_mksetP|apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0 /=..].
      - rewrite -continuous_open_subspace; first exact: interval_open.
        by move: abf; exact/continuous_subspaceW/subset_itvW.
      - by apply: near_at_right => //; rewrite bnd_simp.
      - by apply: near_at_left => //; rewrite bnd_simp.
    case=> ctsoo ctsL ctsR; apply/subspace_continuousP => x /andP[].
    rewrite !bnd_simp/= !le_eqVlt => /predU1P[<-{x}|ax] /predU1P[|].
    - by move/eqP; rewrite lt_eqF.
    - move=> _; apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0 /=.
      move/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0): ctsL; rewrite /at_right !near_withinE.
      apply: filter_app; exists (b - a); rewrite /= ?subr_gt0// => c cba + ac.
      have : a <= c by move: ac => /andP[].
      by rewrite le_eqVlt => /predU1P[->|/[swap] /[apply]//]; rewrite subrr normr0.
    - move=> ->; apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0 /=.
      move/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0): ctsR; rewrite /at_left !near_withinE.
      apply: filter_app; exists (b - a); rewrite /= ?subr_gt0 // => c cba + ac.
      have : c <= b by move: ac => /andP[].
      by rewrite le_eqVlt => /predU1P[->|/[swap] /[apply]//]; rewrite subrr normr0.
    - move=> xb; have aboox : x \in `]a, b[ by rewrite !in_itv/= ax.
      rewrite within_interior; last exact: ctsoo.
      suff : `]a, b[ `<=` interior `[a, b] by exact.
      by rewrite -open_subsetE; [exact: interval_open | exact: subset_itvW].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    continuous_within_itvcyP
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     :
      {within `[a, +oo[, continuous f} <->
      {in `]a, +oo[, continuous f} /\ f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> a^'+] --> f a.
    Proof.
    split=> [cf|].
      split; [apply/in_continuous_mksetP|apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0 /=].
      - rewrite -continuous_open_subspace; first exact: interval_open.
        by apply: continuous_subspaceW cf => ?; rewrite /= !in_itv !andbT/= => /ltW.
      - by apply: near_at_right => //; rewrite bnd_simp.
    move=> [cf fa]; apply/subspace_continuousP => x /andP[].
    rewrite bnd_simp/= le_eqVlt => /predU1P[<-{x}|ax] _.
    - apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0/=; move/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0) : fa.
      rewrite /at_right !near_withinE; apply: filter_app.
      exists 1%R => //= c c1a /[swap]; rewrite in_itv/= andbT le_eqVlt.
      by move=> /predU1P[->|/[swap]/[apply]//]; rewrite subrr normr0.
    - have xaoo : x \in `]a, +oo[ by rewrite in_itv/= andbT.
      rewrite within_interior; last exact: cf.
      suff : `]a, +oo[ `<=` interior `[a, +oo[ by exact.
      rewrite -open_subsetE; first exact: interval_open.
      by move=> ?/=; rewrite !in_itv/= !andbT; exact: ltW.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    continuous_within_itvNycP
    Source code
    b
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     :
      {within `]-oo, b], continuous f} <->
      {in `]-oo, b[, continuous f} /\ f x @[
    x
    Source code
     --> b^'-] --> f b.
    Proof.
    split=> [cf|].
      split; [apply/in_continuous_mksetP|apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0 /=].
      - rewrite -continuous_open_subspace; first exact: interval_open.
        by apply: continuous_subspaceW cf => ?/=; rewrite !in_itv/=; exact: ltW.
      - by apply: near_at_left => //; rewrite bnd_simp.
    move=> [cf fb]; apply/subspace_continuousP => x /andP[_].
    rewrite bnd_simp/= le_eqVlt=> /predU1P[->{x}|xb].
    - apply/cvgrPdist_lt => eps eps_gt0/=; move/cvgrPdist_lt/(_ _ eps_gt0) : fb.
      rewrite /at_right !near_withinE; apply: filter_app.
      exists 1%R => //= c c1b /[swap]; rewrite in_itv/= le_eqVlt.
      by move=> /predU1P[->|/[swap]/[apply]//]; rewrite subrr normr0.
    - have xb_i : x \in `]-oo, b[ by rewrite in_itv/=.
      rewrite within_interior; last exact: cf.
      suff : `]-oo, b[ `<=` interior `]-oo, b] by exact.
      rewrite -open_subsetE; first exact: interval_open.
      by move=> ?/=; rewrite !in_itv/=; exact: ltW.
    Qed.

    End continuous_within_itvP.

    Lemma
    within_continuous_continuous
    Source code
     {
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType} {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType}
        {
    U
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : R -> U)
    x
    Source code
     : (a < b)%R ->
      {within `[a, b], continuous f} -> x \in `]a, b[ -> {for x, continuous f}.
    Proof.
    by move=> ab /continuous_within_itvP-/(_ ab)[+ _] /[swap] xab cf; exact.
    Qed.

    Module Export
    NearNorm
    Source code
    .
    Definition
    near_simpl
    Source code
     := (@near_simpl, @nbhs_normE, @filter_from_normE,
      @near_nbhs_norm).
    Ltac near_simpl := rewrite ?near_simpl.
    End NearNorm.

    Section cvg_composition_pseudometric.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K} {
    T
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Context (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) {
    FF
    Source code
     : Filter F}.
    Implicit Types (f g : T -> V) (s : T -> K) (k : K) (x : T) (a b : V).

    Lemma
    cvgN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : f @ F --> a -> - f @ F --> - a.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; apply: continuous_cvg => //; exact: oppr_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgNP
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : - f @ F --> - a <-> f @ F --> a.
    Proof.
    by split=> /cvgN//; rewrite !opprK. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (- f @ F).
    Proof.
    by move=> /cvgN /cvgP. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgNE
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : cvg ((- f) @ F) = cvg (f @ F).
    Proof.
    by rewrite propeqE; split=> /cvgN; rewrite ?opprK => /cvgP. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgMn
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    n
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : f @ F --> a -> ((@GRing.natmul _)^~n \o f) @ F --> a *+ n.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; apply: continuous_cvg => //; exact: natmul_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgMn
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (((@GRing.natmul _)^~n \o f) @ F).
    Proof.
    by move=> /cvgMn /cvgP. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : f @ F --> a -> g @ F --> b -> (f + g) @ F --> a + b.
    Proof.
    by move=> *; apply: continuous2_cvg => //; exact: (@add_continuous _ _ (a, b)).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (g @ F) -> cvg (f + g @ F).
    Proof.
    by have := cvgP _ (cvgD _ _); apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvgB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : f @ F --> a -> g @ F --> b -> (f - g) @ F --> a - b.
    Proof.
    by move=> ? ?; apply: cvgD => //; apply: cvgN. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (g @ F) -> cvg (f - g @ F).
    Proof.
    by have := cvgP _ (cvgB _ _); apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgDlE
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (g @ F) -> cvg ((f + g) @ F) = cvg (f @ F).
    Proof.
    move=> g_cvg; rewrite propeqE; split; last by move=> /is_cvgD; apply.
    by move=> /is_cvgB /(_ g_cvg); rewrite addrK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvgDrE
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg ((f + g) @ F) = cvg (g @ F).
    Proof.
    by rewrite addrC; apply: is_cvgDlE. Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_sub0
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : (f - g) @ F --> (0 : V) -> g @ F --> a -> f @ F --> a.
    Proof.
    by move=> Cfg Cg; have := cvgD Cfg Cg; rewrite subrK add0r; apply.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_zero
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : (f - cst a) @ F --> (0 : V) -> f @ F --> a.
    Proof.
    by move=> Cfa; apply: cvg_sub0 Cfa (cvg_cst _). Qed.

    Lemma
    subr_cvg0
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : (fun
    x
    Source code
     => f x - a) @ F --> 0 <-> f @ F --> a.
    Proof.
    split=> [?|fFk]; first exact: cvg_zero.
    by rewrite -(@subrr _ a)//; apply: cvgB => //; exact: cvg_cst.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cvg_norm
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : f @ F --> a -> `|f x| @[
    x
    Source code
     --> F] --> (`|a| : K).
    Proof.
    by apply: continuous_cvg; apply: norm_continuous. Qed.

    Lemma
    is_cvg_norm
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg ((Num.norm \o f : T -> K) @ F).
    Proof.
    by have := cvgP _ (cvg_norm _); apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvg0P
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : `|f x| @[
    x
    Source code
     --> F] --> (0:K^o) <-> f @ F --> 0.
    Proof.
    split; last by move=> /cvg_norm; rewrite normr0.
    move=> f0; apply/cvgr0Pnorm_lt => e e_gt0.
    by near do rewrite -normr_id; apply: (@cvgr0_norm_lt _ K^o).
    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.

    Lemma
    norm_cvg0
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : `|f x| @[
    x
    Source code
     --> F] --> (0:K^o) -> f @ F --> 0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite norm_cvg0P. Qed.

    End cvg_composition_pseudometric.

    Lemma
    within_continuousB
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType} {
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
        {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : T -> V) :
      {within A, continuous f} -> {within A, continuous g} ->
      {within A, continuous (f - g)}.
    Proof.
    by move=> cf cg x; apply: cvgB; [exact: cf|exact: cg]. Qed.

    Lemma
    within_continuousD
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : topologicalType} {
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType}
        {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K} (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : T -> V) :
      {within A, continuous f} -> {within A, continuous g} ->
      {within A, continuous (f + g)}.
    Proof.
    by move=> cf cg x; apply: cvgD; [exact: cf|exact: cg]. Qed.

    Section Closed_Ball.

    Definition
    closed_ball_
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : zmodType) (
    norm
    Source code
     : V -> R)
      (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) := [set
    y
    Source code
     | norm (x - y) <= e].

    Definition
    closed_ball
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R)
      (
    x
    Source code
     : V) (
    e
    Source code
     : R) := closure (ball x e).

    Lemma
    closure_ballE
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R)
      (
    c
    Source code
     : V) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : closure (ball c r) = closed_ball c r.
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    closed_ball0
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : realDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType R)
      (
    v
    Source code
     : V) (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : r <= 0 -> closed_ball v r = set0.
    Proof.
    by move=> r0; rewrite -subset0 => w; rewrite /closed_ball le0_ball0// closure0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    closed_ballxx
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R) (
    x
    Source code
     : V)
      (
    e
    Source code
     : R) : 0 < e -> closed_ball x e x.
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; exact/subset_closure/ballxx. Qed.

    Lemma
    closed_ball_closed
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R) (
    x
    Source code
     : V)
      (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : closed (closed_ball x r).
    Proof.
    exact: closed_closure. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_closed_ball
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numDomainType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R) (
    x
    Source code
     : V)
      (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : ball x r `<=` closed_ball x r.
    Proof.
    exact: subset_closure. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_closure_half
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R) (
    x
    Source code
     : V)
      (
    r
    Source code
     : R) : 0 < r -> closed_ball x (r / 2) `<=` ball x r.
    Proof.
    move:r => _/posnumP[r] z /(_ (ball z ((r%:num/2)%:pos)%:num)) [].
      exact: nbhsx_ballx.
    by move=> y [+/ball_sym]; rewrite [t in ball x t z]splitr; apply: ball_triangle.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    le_closed_ball
    Source code
     (
    R
    Source code
     : numFieldType) (
    M
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricType R)
      (
    x
    Source code
     : M) (
    e1
    Source code
    e2
    Source code
     : R) : (e1 <= e2)%O -> closed_ball x e1 `<=` closed_ball x e2.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /closed_ball => le; apply/closureS/le_ball. Qed.

    End Closed_Ball.
    #[deprecated(since="mathcomp-analysis 1.14.0", note="renamed to `closure_ballE`")]
    Notation
    closure_ball
    Source code
     := closure_ballE (only parsing).

    Section limit_composition_pseudometric.
    Context {
    K
    Source code
     : numFieldType} {
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K} {
    T
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Context (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) {
    FF
    Source code
     : ProperFilter F}.
    Implicit Types (f g : T -> V) (s : T -> K) (k : K) (x : T) (a : V).

    Lemma
    limN
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> lim (- f @ F) = - lim (f @ F).
    Proof.
    by move=> ?; apply: cvg_lim => //; apply: cvgN. Qed.

    Lemma
    limD
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (g @ F) ->
       lim (f + g @ F) = lim (f @ F) + lim (g @ F).
    Proof.
    by move=> ? ?; apply: cvg_lim => //; apply: cvgD. Qed.

    Lemma
    limB
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> cvg (g @ F) ->
       lim (f - g @ F) = lim (f @ F) - lim (g @ F).
    Proof.
    by move=> ? ?; apply: cvg_lim => //; apply: cvgB. Qed.

    Lemma
    lim_norm
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : cvg (f @ F) -> lim ((fun
    x
    Source code
     => `|f x| : K) @ F) = `|lim (f @ F)|.
    Proof.
    move=> ?; apply: cvg_lim.
      exact: (@norm_hausdorff K K^o).
    exact: cvg_norm.
    Qed.

    End limit_composition_pseudometric.

    Section domination.
    Context {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} {
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType} {
    V
    Source code
    W
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K}.

    Definition
    dominated_by
    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    k
    Source code
     : K) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> W) (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) :=
      F [set
    x
    Source code
     | `|f x| <= k * `|h x|].

    Definition
    strictly_dominated_by

    shift : forall {R : GRing.Zmodule.Exports.zmodType}, R -> R -> R shift is not universe polymorphic Arguments shift {R} x%_ring_scope / y%_ring_scope The reduction tactics unfold shift when applied to 2 arguments shift is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.pseudometric_normed_Zmodule.shift Declared in library mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.pseudometric_normed_Zmodule, line 80, characters 11-16

    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    k
    Source code
     : K) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> W)
        (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) :=
      F [set
    x
    Source code
     | `|f x| < k * `|h x|].

    Lemma
    sub_dominatedl
    Source code
     (
    h
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    k
    Source code
     : K) (
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : set_system T) : F `=>` G ->
      (dominated_by h k)^~ G `<=` (dominated_by h k)^~ F.
    Proof.
    by move=> FG f; exact: FG. Qed.

    End domination.

    Lemma
    sub_dominatedr
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    K
    Source code
     : numDomainType)
        (
    V
    Source code
     : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K)
        (
    h
    Source code
     : T -> V) (
    k
    Source code
     : K) (
    f

    NearNorm.near_simpl : (forall (U : Type) (T : filteredType U) (x : T) (P : set U), (\forall x0 \near nbhs x, P x0) = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (U : Type) (T : filteredType U) (x : T) (P : set U), nbhs x P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (X : Type) (fX : filteredType X) (x : fX) (P : set X), nbhs x P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (T : Type) (F : filter_on T) (P : set T), (\near F, P F) = (\forall x \near F, P x)) * (forall (T U : Type) (f : T -> U) (F : set_system T) (P : set U), (\forall y \near (f x @[x --> F])%classic, P y) = (\near F, P (f F))) * (forall (T U : Type) (f : T -> set U) (F : set_system T) (P : set U), (\forall y \near (f x `@[x --> F])%classic, P y) = (\near F, exists y : U, f F y /\ P y)) * (forall (T T' U U' : Type) (f : T -> U) (g : T' -> U') (F : set_system T) (G : set_system T') (P : U -> set U'), Filter F -> Filter G -> (\forall y \near (f x @[x --> F])%classic & y' \near (g x @[x --> G])%classic, P y y') = (\near F & G, P (f F) (g G))) * (forall (K : numDomainType) (V : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K) (x : V) (P : V -> Prop), nbhs_ball_ (ball_ normr) x P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (K : numDomainType) (V : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K) (x : V) (P : V -> Prop), filter_from [set x0 | (0 < x0)%R] (ball_ normr x) P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (K : numDomainType) (V : pseudoMetricNormedZmodType K) (x : V) (P : V -> Prop), (\forall x0 \near nbhs_ball_ (ball_ normr) x, P x0) = (\near x, P x)) NearNorm.near_simpl is not universe polymorphic NearNorm.near_simpl is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.pseudometric_normed_Zmodule.NearNorm.near_simpl Declared in library mathcomp.analysis.normedtype_theory.pseudometric_normed_Zmodule, line 1050, characters 11-21

    Lemma
    bounded_fun_has_ubound
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType) (
    a
    Source code
     : T -> R^o) :

    Proof.
    move=> [M [Mreal]]/(_ (`|M| + 1)).
    rewrite (le_lt_trans (ler_norm _)) ?ltrDl// => /(_ erefl) aM.
    by exists (`|M| + 1) => _ [n _ <-]; rewrite (le_trans (ler_norm _))// aM.
    Qed.

    Lemma

     (
    T

     : Type) (
    R

     : realFieldType) (

     (

     : Type) (

    Lemma
    bounded_funD
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    R
    Source code
     : realFieldType) (
    a

    b
    Source code
     : T -> R^o) :
      bounded_fun a -> bounded_fun b -> bounded_fun (a \+ b).

    Unshelve. all: by end_near. Qed.
